children.label: A
children.text: a general description of the ultimate configuration of the Program;

children.label: B
children.text: a description of each of the existing components of the Program listed in ; andsection 1411(a)(1) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: estimates regarding the stages on which planned components of the Program listed in will be brought on-line.section 1411(a)(2) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the extent to which the existing components of the Program currently meet, and the planned components will meet, the Program goals set forth in ; andsection 1412 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: importers, brokers, and other users of the Program, and

children.label: ii
children.text: Customs Service occupations, operations, processes, and systems.

children.heading: Implementation plan, testing, and evaluation
children.label: b Implementation plan, testing, and evaluation
B
children.text: test the component in order to assess its viability;

children.label: C
children.text: evaluate the component in order to assess its contribution toward achieving the program goals; and

children.label: D
children.text: transmit to the Committees the implementation plan, the testing results, and an evaluation report.

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary may implement on a permanent basis any Program component referred to in paragraph (1) on or after the date which is 30 days after paragraph (1)(D) is complied with.

children.label: i
children.text: the days either House is not in session because of an adjournment of more than 3 days to a day certain or an adjournment of the Congress sine die, and

children.label: ii
children.text: any Saturday and Sunday, not excluded under clause (i), when either House is not in session.

children.label: A
children.text: develop a user satisfaction survey of parties participating in the Program;

children.label: B
children.text: evaluate the results of the user satisfaction survey on a biennial basis (fiscal years) and transmit a report to the Committees on the evaluation by no later than the 90th day after the close of each 2d fiscal year;

children.label: i
children.text: a written evaluation of such component before the 180th day after , and before the implementation of the planned Program components listed in section 1411(a)(2)(B) and (C) of this title, andDecember 8, 1993

children.label: ii
children.text: a report on such component for each of the 3 full fiscal years occurring after , which report shall be transmitted not later than the 90th day after the close of each such year; andDecember 8, 1993

children.label: D
children.text: not later than the 90th day after the close of fiscal year 1994, and annually thereafter through fiscal year 2000, transmit to the Committees a written evaluation with respect to the implementation and effect on users of each of the planned Program components listed in .section 1411(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Committees
children.label: c Committees
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “Committees” means the Committee on Ways and Means of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Finance of the Senate.
